name: Love Senior
original_name: พี่ว้ากคะ รักหนูได้มั้ย
overview: Second year electrical engineering student Gyoza is head hazer of her branch. As part of their initiation activities, freshy Manaow asks for Gyoza's signature. Contrary to Manaow's expectations of the small senior, Gyoza has a cool personality. Instead of getting an easy signature, Gyoza makes Manaow agree to compete in the electrical engineering freshy contest paired with her friend Ali.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER | พี่ว้ากคะ...รักหนูได้มั้ย?! | Love Senior The Series
